article_title: Issuance of Licenses and Certificates to Manufacturers, Transporters, and Dealers
text:
(a) A holder of a dealer’s license issued under this article is not in violation of paragraph (29) of subdivision (a) of Section 1770 of the Civil Code for excluding from the advertised, displayed, or offered price of a vehicle a fee or charge identified in subdivision (b) of Section 11713.1.

(b) This section shall become operative on July 1, 2024.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 5. OCCUPATIONAL LICENSING AND BUSINESS REGULATIONS [11100 - 12217]
### Chapter 4. Manufacturers, Transporters, Dealers, and Salesmen [11700 - 11909]
#### Article 1. Issuance of Licenses and Certificates to Manufacturers, Transporters, and Dealers [11700 - 11740]
##### § 11713.27

(a) A holder of a dealer’s license issued under this article is not in violation of paragraph (29) of subdivision (a) of Section 1770 of the Civil Code for excluding from the advertised, displayed, or offered price of a vehicle a fee or charge identified in subdivision (b) of Section 11713.1.

(b) This section shall become operative on July 1, 2024.

*(Added by Stats. 2023, Ch. 400, Sec. 10. (SB 478) Effective January 1, 2024. Operative July 1, 2024, by its own provisions.)*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: A holder of a dealer’s license issued under this article is not in violation of paragraph (29) of subdivision (a) of Section 1770 of the Civil Code for excluding from the advertised, displayed, or offered price of a vehicle a fee or charge identified in subdivision (b) of Section 11713.1.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: This section shall become operative on July 1, 2024.
